summary: A detailed mobile optimization review for the GeoResilience Hub website based on four mobile screenshots (M1-M4). Identifies five key issues: invisible hamburger menu, broken inner-page layouts, hardcoded padding, missing small-screen breakpoint, and card/grid overflow. Proposes a four-phase fix plan covering navigation, section layouts, small-screen breakpoint, and cross-page consistency. Includes decision points for the user.
